allow: Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=5 -o BatchMode=yes hopper 'echo "connected as $\(whoami\)@$\(hostname\)" && pwd')
Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=5 -o BatchMode=yes -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 misterobots@192.168.2.102 'echo "connected as $\(whoami\)@$\(hostname\)" && pwd')
Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 misterobots@192.168.2.102 'ls -la ~/ | grep -i agent; echo "---"; find ~ -maxdepth 3 -name "Agent_Swarm" -type d 2>/dev/null')

Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 misterobots@192.168.2.102 'cd ~/Agent_Swarm && echo "=== git status ===" && git status -s && echo "=== git log -5 ===" && git log --oneline -5 && echo "=== git remote ===" && git remote -v && echo "=== branch ===" && git branch --show-current')

Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 misterobots@192.168.2.102 'echo "=== mempalace_bak contents ===" && ls -la ~/Agent_Swarm/control_plane/mempalace_bak/ 2>&1 | head -20 && echo "=== mempalace_bak size ===" && du -sh ~/Agent_Swarm/control_plane/mempalace_bak/ && echo "=== running mempalace container ===" && cd ~/Agent_Swarm && docker compose ps mempalace 2>&1 | head -10 && echo "=== compose project root ===" && ls Agent_Swarm/docker-compose*.yml 2>/dev/null; ls ~/Agent_Swarm/docker-compose*.yml 2>/dev/null')

Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 misterobots@192.168.2.102 'echo "=== docker ps for mempalace ===" && docker ps --format "table {{.Names}}\\t{{.Image}}\\t{{.Status}}" | grep -i mempalace; echo "=== compose files on box ===" && find ~/ -maxdepth 4 -name "docker-compose*.yml" 2>/dev/null; echo "=== grep for mempalace in compose files ===" && grep -lri "mempalace" ~/Agent_Swarm/*.yml ~/docker-compose.yml 2>/dev/null')

Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 misterobots@192.168.2.102 'echo "=== mempalace service in control_plane compose ===" && grep -A 20 "^  mempalace:" ~/Agent_Swarm/control_plane/docker-compose.yml')

Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 misterobots@192.168.2.102 'echo "=== mempalace schema state ===" && docker exec postgres psql -U langfuse -d langfuse -c "\\dt mempalace.*" 2>&1; echo "=== row counts ===" && docker exec postgres psql -U langfuse -d langfuse -c "SELECT '\\''memories'\\'' AS tbl, count\(*\) FROM mempalace.memories UNION ALL SELECT '\\''agent_snapshots'\\'', count\(*\) FROM mempalace.agent_snapshots UNION ALL SELECT '\\''team_memories'\\'', count\(*\) FROM mempalace.team_memories UNION ALL SELECT '\\''memory_audit_log'\\'', count\(*\) FROM mempalace.memory_audit_log UNION ALL SELECT '\\''extraction_log'\\'', count\(*\) FROM mempalace.extraction_log;"')
Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 misterobots@192.168.2.102 'cd ~/Agent_Swarm && git pull --ff-only origin main 2>&1 | tail -20 && echo "=== HEAD now ===" && git log --oneline -1')

Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes -i '~/.ssh/id_ed25519' misterobots@192.168.2.102 'BACKUP=~/mempalace_backup_$\(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S\).sql && docker exec postgres pg_dump -U langfuse --schema=mempalace langfuse > "$BACKUP" 2>&1 && echo "=== backup written ===" && ls -lh "$BACKUP" && echo "=== sanity \(table count + bytes\) ===" && grep -c "^CREATE TABLE" "$BACKUP" && wc -c "$BACKUP"')
Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 misterobots@192.168.2.102 'cd ~/Agent_Swarm/control_plane && docker compose build mempalace 2>&1 | tail -30')

Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 misterobots@192.168.2.102 'cd ~/Agent_Swarm/control_plane && docker compose run --rm --entrypoint alembic mempalace stamp 0001_baseline 2>&1 | tail -20')
Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25729 misterobots@192.168.2.102 'cd ~/Agent_Swarm/control_plane && docker compose run --rm --entrypoint alembic mempalace current 2>&1 | tail -10')
Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 misterobots@192.168.2.102 'cd ~/Agent_Swarm/control_plane && docker compose up -d --force-recreate mempalace 2>&1 | tail -15')
Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 misterobots@192.168.2.102 'cd ~/Agent_Swarm/control_plane && sleep 8 && docker compose logs --tail=80 mempalace 2>&1')

Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 misterobots@192.168.2.102 'cd ~/Agent_Swarm/control_plane && docker compose logs --tail=30 mempalace 2>&1 | tail -25 && echo "=== container status ===" && docker compose ps mempalace 2>&1 | tail -5 && echo "=== alembic current ===" && docker compose exec -T mempalace alembic current 2>&1 | tail -5 && echo "=== health ===" && curl -s http://192.168.2.102:8200/health')

Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 misterobots@192.168.2.102 'echo "=== row counts \(was: 162/1/1/0/42\) ===" && docker exec postgres psql -U langfuse -d langfuse -c "SELECT '\\''memories'\\'' AS tbl, count\(*\) FROM mempalace.memories UNION ALL SELECT '\\''agent_snapshots'\\'', count\(*\) FROM mempalace.agent_snapshots UNION ALL SELECT '\\''team_memories'\\'', count\(*\) FROM mempalace.team_memories UNION ALL SELECT '\\''memory_audit_log'\\'', count\(*\) FROM mempalace.memory_audit_log UNION ALL SELECT '\\''extraction_log'\\'', count\(*\) FROM mempalace.extraction_log;" && echo "=== unique constraints in mempalace ===" && docker exec postgres psql -U langfuse -d langfuse -c "SELECT conname, conrelid::regclass FROM pg_constraint WHERE connamespace = '\\''mempalace'\\''::regnamespace AND contype = '\\''u'\\'';" && echo "=== alembic_version row ===" && docker exec postgres psql -U langfuse -d langfuse -c "SELECT * FROM mempalace.alembic_version;"')

Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 misterobots@192.168.2.102 'cd ~/Agent_Swarm && git pull --ff-only origin main 2>&1 | tail -10 && cd control_plane && echo "=== build ===" && docker compose build mempalace 2>&1 | tail -8')

Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 misterobots@192.168.2.102 'cd ~/Agent_Swarm/control_plane && docker compose up -d --force-recreate mempalace 2>&1 | tail -5 && sleep 10 && echo "=== logs ===" && docker compose logs --tail=30 mempalace 2>&1 | tail -25 && echo "=== status ===" && docker compose ps mempalace 2>&1 | tail -3 && echo "=== health ===" && curl -fsS http://192.168.2.102:8200/health')

Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 misterobots@192.168.2.102 'echo "=== alembic current \(expect 0002 still\) ===" && cd ~/Agent_Swarm/control_plane && docker compose exec -T mempalace alembic current 2>&1 | tail -3 && echo "=== /v1/memories/stats ===" && curl -fsS http://192.168.2.102:8200/v1/memories/stats && echo && echo "=== /v1/palace/audit/extractions \(rewritten in #27\) ===" && curl -fsS "http://192.168.2.102:8200/v1/palace/audit/extractions" | head -c 400 && echo "..." && echo "=== /v1/palace/layout \(uses new _derive_wing\) ===" && curl -fsS "http://192.168.2.102:8200/v1/palace/layout" | head -c 300 && echo "..."')

Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 misterobots@192.168.2.102 'echo "=== agent_runtime container location ===" && docker ps --format "table {{.Names}}\\t{{.Image}}\\t{{.Status}}" | grep -E "agent_runtime|router|main" | head -5 && echo "=== execution plane host ===" && grep -A 2 "agent_runtime:" ~/Agent_Swarm/execution_plane/docker-compose.yml | head -8')

Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=5 -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 misterobots@192.168.2.101 'echo "connected as $\(whoami\)@$\(hostname\)" && docker ps --format "table {{.Names}}\\t{{.Status}}" | grep -i agent | head -5')

Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 misterobots@192.168.2.102 'echo "=== try agent_runtime via hopper docker context \(if in same compose stack\) ===" && docker ps --format "{{.Names}}" | head -20 && echo "=== check execution plane containers from hopper ===" && docker -H ssh://misterobots@192.168.2.101 ps 2>&1 | head -3')

Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 misterobots@192.168.2.102 'echo "=== project memories in live DB ===" && docker exec postgres psql -U langfuse -d langfuse -c "SELECT count\(*\) AS total, count\(DISTINCT agent_id\) AS unique_agent_ids, count\(DISTINCT owner_id\) AS unique_owner_ids FROM mempalace.memories WHERE domain = '\\''projects'\\'';" 2>&1')

Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 misterobots@192.168.2.102 'echo "=== check turing for any port 8200 listener ===" && nc -zv 192.168.2.103 8200 2>&1 | head -3 && echo "=== traefik routes if any ===" && curl -fsS http://192.168.2.103/api/http/routers 2>&1 | head -5 || echo "no traefik api"')
